name: Red Cooked Short Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat the short ribs thoroughly with flour; reserve 1/4 cup of the excess flour.
2. Heat oil in a Dutch oven or large saucepan over medium heat.
3. Add the ribs and brown them slowly on all sides. Drain off any excess oil.
4. Combine 1 1/4 cups water, teriyaki sauce, garlic, ginger, and cloves; pour over the ribs.
5. Cover and simmer for 2 hours, or until the ribs are tender.
6. Meanwhile, blend the reserved flour with the remaining 1/2 cup water to form a slurry.
7. Remove the ribs to a serving platter and keep warm.
8. Pour the pan drippings into a large measuring cup; skim off any fat.
9. Add enough water to measure 2 1/2 cups, return to the pan, and bring to a boil.
10. Gradually stir in the flour mixture until thickened. Serve with the ribs.
Serves: 4
